steps.title: Foundations
steps.objective: Build essential groundwork for your career
tasks: Set up your learning workspace
Create a study schedule
Join relevant online communities

children.title: Industry Fundamentals
children.objective: Understand the core concepts of volunteer mentor
tasks: Build a public portfolio showcasing projects related to volunteer mentor
Connect with professionals in the field and request informational interviews
Set short-term learning goals and review progress every month
Publish or present your project work on a portfolio or site
Join local/online communities for practical advice and networking

children.title: Tools & Environment
tasks: Research standard tools for volunteer mentor
Install primary software tools
Create account on professional networks

steps.title: Core Skills Development
steps.objective: Master essential skills for volunteer mentor
tasks: Create a skills tracking spreadsheet
Set up practice projects
Find a mentor

children.title: Advocate For Others Proficiency
children.objective: Develop proficiency in advocate for others
tasks: Complete a vocational certificate focused on advocate for others or tools used in volunteer mentor

children.title: Assist Clients With Personal Development Proficiency
children.objective: Develop proficiency in assist clients with personal development
milestones: Complete assist clients with personal development course
Demonstrate assist clients with personal development usage
Pass assist clients with personal development quiz
resources: Assist Clients With Personal Development Resources
tasks: Practice assist clients with personal development fundamentals
Apply assist clients with personal development in small scenarios

children.title: Brief Volunteers Proficiency
tasks: Practice brief volunteers fundamentals
Apply brief volunteers in small scenarios

children.title: Capacity Building Proficiency
tasks: Practice capacity building fundamentals
Apply capacity building in small scenarios

steps.title: Practical Application
steps.objective: Gain hands-on experience through projects or simulations
tasks: Research industry standard projects
Document process and outcomes

children.title: Applied Practice Project
children.objective: Apply core skills in a realistic scenario
tasks: Select a real-world problem to solve
Plan the solution
Set short-term learning goals and review progress every month
Join local/online communities for practical advice and networking
Connect with professionals in the field and request informational interviews
Complete a vocational certificate focused on advocate for others or tools used in volunteer mentor

children.title: Advanced Capstone
tasks: Define advanced project requirements
Join local/online communities for practical advice and networking
Set short-term learning goals and review progress every month
Intern or co-op with industry partners to build professional experience
Publish or present your project work on a portfolio or site
Connect with professionals in the field and request informational interviews

steps.title: Specialization
tasks: Research trending specializations in volunteer mentor
Select a niche

children.title: Specialization Track
children.objective: Deep dive into a specific area
tasks: Publish or present your project work on a portfolio or site
Set short-term learning goals and review progress every month
Connect with professionals in the field and request informational interviews
Complete a vocational certificate focused on advocate for others or tools used in volunteer mentor

steps.title: Career Launch
steps.objective: Land your first role in the field
tasks: Develop job search strategy
Practice interview questions

children.title: Professional Branding
tasks: Tailor resume for volunteer mentor
Highlight key skills: advocate for others, assist clients with personal development, brief volunteers

children.title: Job Search Strategy
tasks: Identify top companies for volunteer mentor
Prepare for interviews
